apps.name: Show Me the Saju
apps.tagline: Discover your Korean Four Pillars chart in seconds — free, private, and with no sign-up.
apps.coverAlt: Show Me the Saju Korean Four Pillars reading
apps.about: A privacy-first, multilingual introduction to Saju. Enter birth details to reveal a Korean Four Pillars chart, then explore clear explanations of the elements and symbols behind the reading.

details.label: Experience

details.label: Privacy
details.value: Birth data stays in your browser
